notices.title: Reminder: Second Quarter Maintenance Dues (Apr–Jun 2026) Payment
notices.content: All gala owners and tenants across Buildings 1 to 14 are reminded that maintenance dues for the April-June 2026 quarter were due on 10th July 2026. Members who have not yet cleared their dues are requested to make payment at the earliest to avoid a late payment charge of 2% per month as per the Federation's bye-laws. Payments can be made via NEFT/RTGS to the HDIL-IPCA Federation account (A/c No. 5021 XXXX XX41, HDFC Bank, Virar East Branch, IFSC HDFC0001234) or by cheque/DD in favour of 'HDIL Industrial Park Cooperative Association'. Please mention your Gala Number and Building Number in the payment reference. For billing queries, contact the Federation office at +91 98207 45611 (Mon-Sat, 10 AM-6 PM) or accounts@hdil-ipca.in.

notices.title: Planned Water Supply Interruption – Buildings 7 to 11 on 18th July
notices.content: Members are informed that the Vasai-Virar Municipal Corporation (VVMC) will be carrying out pipeline valve replacement work near the Chandansar water distribution point on Friday, 18th July 2026, from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. As a result, water supply to Buildings 7, 8, 9, 10 and 11 will remain suspended during this period. Overhead tanks are being filled in advance on 17th evening; units with washing, dyeing or food-processing operations dependent on continuous water supply are advised to store water accordingly. A water tanker will be stationed near Gate No. 2 for emergency use. For assistance, contact the maintenance in-charge, Mr. Prakash Rane, at +91 90290 11347.

notices.title: Fire NOC Renewal Due – Submit Documents by 31st August 2026
notices.content: As per directions from the Virar Fire Brigade Station, all gala owners operating manufacturing or storage units above 200 sq. ft. must renew their Fire No-Objection Certificate (NOC) before 31st August 2026. Owners are required to submit a copy of the previous NOC, fire extinguisher AMC certificate, and the prescribed renewal fee (Rs. 2,500 for units up to 1,000 sq. ft., Rs. 4,500 above) to the Federation office in Building 3. Units that fail to renew on time may face suspension of power supply as per the MSEDCL and fire department joint circular dated 2nd June 2026. Fire safety equipment vendors empanelled with the Federation (Agni Suraksha Services, +91 98192 33087) can assist with AMC renewal and mock drill certification.

notices.title: Notice of 14th Annual General Meeting – 15th August 2026
notices.content: Notice is hereby given that the 14th Annual General Meeting (AGM) of HDIL Industrial Park Cooperative Association will be held on Saturday, 15th August 2026, at 4:00 PM at the Community Hall, Building 5. Agenda includes: adoption of audited accounts for FY 2025-26, election of two Managing Committee members, ratification of the revised maintenance tariff, and discussion on the proposed CCTV upgrade project. Gala owners unable to attend may submit a proxy authorisation in the prescribed format available at the Federation office by 12th August 2026. As per bye-law 42, a quorum of one-third of registered members is required; please ensure your maintenance account is clear to be eligible to vote.

notices.title: Revised Parking Guidelines for Two-Wheelers and Four-Wheelers
notices.content: To ease congestion and ensure fire-tender access, the Managing Committee has revised parking arrangements effective 1st August 2026. Four-wheelers must park only in the marked bays behind Buildings 2, 6 and 10; two-wheeler parking is designated in the yellow-lined zones near each building entrance. Parking directly in front of shutters, fire hydrants, and the internal access road connecting Gate 1 to Gate 3 is strictly prohibited, and vehicles found blocking these areas will be clamped or towed at the owner's cost. Visitor and loading vehicles must obtain a gate pass from security and are permitted a maximum 45-minute halt for loading/unloading. Queries may be directed to the security supervisor at +91 91678 20456.

notices.title: Ganesh Chaturthi Holiday Schedule – Federation Office Closure
notices.content: The Federation office will remain closed for Ganesh Chaturthi from 26th to 29th August 2026, resuming normal working hours on 31st August 2026. Security staff, water pump operators and the fire watch team will remain on duty round the clock throughout the holiday period. Members are requested to ensure their units are securely locked and electrical mains switched off before the holidays. In case of any emergency during the closure, please contact the 24x7 security control room at +91 88799 60021 or the duty officer, Mr. Santosh Waghmare, at +91 97690 44215. Ganpati immersion arrangements near the common ground will be coordinated by the cultural committee; details will be displayed on the notice board.

notices.title: Quarterly Pest Control Drive – Building-wise Schedule Announced
notices.content: The Federation's empanelled pest control agency, Rentokil PCI, will conduct the quarterly rodent and cockroach control treatment across the park between 20th and 25th July 2026. Schedule: Buildings 1-4 on 20th July, Buildings 5-8 on 22nd July, Buildings 9-11 on 24th July, and Buildings 12-14 on 25th July, each from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM. Gala owners and tenants are requested to keep their shutters accessible during the allotted slot and to cover exposed raw materials or food items before treatment. This service is included in the common maintenance charges at no extra cost. Units requiring treatment outside the scheduled slot may contact the Federation office to arrange a separate paid visit.

notices.title: Updated Visitor Entry and Vehicle Gate Pass Protocol
notices.content: In view of recent incidents of unauthorised entry reported at neighbouring industrial estates, the security protocol at all three gates has been tightened with effect from 1st July 2026. All visitors, including delivery and transport vehicles, must now register at the gate with a valid photo ID and the name of the unit/gala being visited; the security guard will issue a gate pass and inform the concerned tenant or authorised person before entry is permitted. Entry of goods vehicles after 10:00 PM will require prior written intimation to the Federation office. CCTV coverage has been extended to cover Gate 2 and the internal parking areas near Buildings 9-11. Tenants are requested to update the list of authorised staff and regular vendors for their units with the security office to avoid delays.

notices.title: Mandatory Tenant Verification – Submit Police Antecedent Form by 15th August
notices.content: As per the circular received from Virar Police Station (Social Security Branch) dated 5th July 2026, all tenants operating units within HDIL Industrial Park are required to complete tenant verification formalities. Tenants must submit a copy of Aadhar Card, PAN Card, the registered leave-and-licence agreement, and two passport-size photographs, along with the duly filled Tenant Verification Form (available at the Federation office or downloadable from the notice board) by 15th August 2026. This is a statutory requirement and non-compliance may result in the matter being reported to the local police station. Gala owners are also requested to ensure their tenants complete this process, as the owner remains jointly responsible for verification under the applicable Maharashtra Police Act provisions for rented commercial premises.

notices.title: Swachhata Pakhwada – Federation-wide Cleanliness Drive, 1st–15th August
notices.content: The Managing Committee is organising a Swachhata Pakhwada (Cleanliness Fortnight) from 1st to 15th August 2026 in line with the state government's cleanliness initiative for industrial estates. New colour-coded waste segregation bins (green for dry waste, blue for wet waste, red for hazardous industrial waste) have been installed at collection points near every building. Members are encouraged to participate in the community clean-up drive on Sunday, 9th August, starting 8:00 AM near the Building 5 ground. A 'Cleanest Gala' recognition will be awarded to three units judged on housekeeping and waste management practices, with certificates distributed at the AGM. Units generating hazardous or chemical waste (electroplating, dyeing, printing) are reminded to use only MPCB-authorised disposal vendors and retain manifest copies for inspection.

workshops.title: Fire Safety & Emergency Evacuation Training
workshops.description: A hands-on workshop conducted by certified instructors from the Virar Fire Brigade covering use of fire extinguishers, fire hydrant operation, and building evacuation procedures. Includes a live extinguisher demonstration on the ground behind Building 5 and a mock evacuation drill. Recommended for gala owners, supervisors, and at least two staff members per unit handling flammable materials.
workshops.location: Community Hall, Building 5, HDIL Industrial Park

workshops.title: GST Compliance & Input Tax Credit Workshop for MSMEs
workshops.description: Chartered accountant Mr. Rajesh Deshmukh (Deshmukh & Associates) will walk small manufacturers and traders through GSTR-1/3B filing, e-invoicing thresholds, common input tax credit mismatches, and recent GST Council notifications relevant to MSME units. Session includes a Q&A on notices and departmental audits; bring your latest GST return for individual queries.

workshops.title: Digital Marketing & Online Selling for Small Manufacturers
workshops.description: A practical session on listing products on IndiaMART and GeM, setting up a WhatsApp Business catalogue, basic Instagram/Facebook promotion, and handling B2B enquiries online. Led by a digital marketing consultant with experience working with MSME clusters in Palghar district. Best suited for owners of engineering, garment, and packaging units looking to expand beyond local buyers.
workshops.location: Community Hall, Building 5, HDIL Industrial Park

workshops.title: First-Aid & Basic Life Support Training
workshops.description: Certified trainers from St. John Ambulance will conduct a practical first-aid session covering treatment of workplace cuts, burns, electric shock, and CPR basics relevant to manufacturing floor injuries. Participants completing the session will receive a first-aid certificate valid for two years. Each unit is encouraged to depute at least one designated first-aider.
workshops.location: Open Ground near Building 8, HDIL Industrial Park

workshops.title: Waste Management & Effluent Disposal Awareness Session
workshops.description: Officials from the Maharashtra Pollution Control Board (MPCB) Palghar office will explain proper segregation, storage, and disposal norms for industrial waste, e-waste, and effluent discharge, along with documentation required for Consent to Operate renewals. Particularly relevant for plastics, chemical, electroplating, and dyeing units in the park.
workshops.location: Community Hall, Building 5, HDIL Industrial Park

workshops.title: Women Entrepreneurship & Self-Help Group Meet
workshops.description: An interactive meet for women running or co-managing units in the park, and women interested in starting small manufacturing or trading ventures. Covers Mudra loan schemes, Maharashtra State Women's Development Corporation support, and forming a local self-help group for bulk raw material purchase and shared marketing. Guest speaker: a woman entrepreneur running a garment unit in Building 5.
workshops.location: Terrace Hall, Building 2, HDIL Industrial Park

vacancies.title: CNC Machine Operator
vacancies.description: Precision Engineering Works (Gala No. 214, Building 9) requires an experienced CNC Lathe/VMC operator for its component manufacturing unit supplying to automotive ancillary units. Responsibilities include reading engineering drawings, setting tools, running production batches, and basic quality checks using vernier and micrometer. Rotational shift work (day/night).
vacancies.eligibility: ITI (Turner/Machinist/Fitter) with minimum 2 years' hands-on experience operating CNC lathe or VMC machines; candidates familiar with Fanuc/Siemens controllers preferred.

vacancies.title: Accounts Assistant
vacancies.description: Shree Balaji Packaging Pvt. Ltd. (Gala No. 45, Building 3, GSTIN 27AABCS4521F1ZQ) is looking for an Accounts Assistant to manage day-to-day bookkeeping, vendor and customer ledgers, GST return data preparation, and bank reconciliation for its corrugated box manufacturing operation.
vacancies.eligibility: B.Com graduate with 1-3 years' relevant experience; working knowledge of Tally Prime, GST return filing (GSTR-1/3B), and MS Excel is mandatory.

vacancies.title: Quality Inspector
vacancies.description: Om Sai Plastics (Gala No. 112, Building 6) manufactures injection-moulded plastic components for household and industrial use, and is hiring a Quality Inspector to conduct incoming raw material checks, in-process inspection, and final dispatch quality clearance against customer specifications.
vacancies.eligibility: Diploma in Mechanical/Plastics/Production Engineering with at least 2 years' QC experience in a plastics or injection moulding unit; proficiency with vernier caliper, micrometer, and basic SPC record-keeping required.

vacancies.title: Delivery Driver (LMV)
vacancies.description: Mahalaxmi Steel Traders (Gala No. 78, Building 4) requires a reliable delivery driver to transport steel sheets, pipes, and fabricated material to customer sites across Virar, Vasai, Nallasopara, and Palghar, and to handle basic loading coordination with warehouse staff.
vacancies.eligibility: Valid LMV commercial driving licence with minimum 3 years' driving experience; good knowledge of local routes; clean traffic record required. HMV licence will be an added advantage.

vacancies.title: Packaging Helper
vacancies.description: Nutrifresh Foods Pvt. Ltd. (Gala No. 301, Building 12) is hiring packaging helpers for its snack food unit to handle weighing, sealing, cartoning, and labelling of finished products on the packaging line, working in coordination with the shift supervisor to meet daily dispatch targets.
vacancies.eligibility: Minimum 8th standard pass; food handling/hygiene training certificate preferred but not mandatory (training provided); must be comfortable working in a cold packaging area and standing for extended shifts.

vacancies.title: Store Supervisor
vacancies.description: Krishna Electricals & Hardware (Gala No. 156, Building 7) requires a Store Supervisor to manage inventory of electrical goods and hardware items, oversee stock inward/outward entries, coordinate with the billing team, and conduct periodic stock audits across its two godowns.
vacancies.eligibility: Graduate in any discipline with 3-5 years' experience in warehouse/inventory management; familiarity with billing/ERP software (Marg or Busy preferred) and basic Excel-based stock reporting required.

vacancies.title: Office Admin cum Receptionist
vacancies.description: Vishal Garments Manufacturing (Gala No. 89, Building 5) is looking for an Office Admin cum Receptionist to handle front-desk duties, attend calls and visitor enquiries, maintain attendance and staff records, and assist with courier and basic purchase documentation.
vacancies.eligibility: HSC or Graduate with good communication skills in Hindi, Marathi and English; working knowledge of MS Office (Word, Excel, email) required; prior front-office experience preferred. Female candidates are encouraged to apply for this front-desk role.

vacancies.title: Machine Operator – Injection Moulding
vacancies.description: Ganesh Polymers (Gala No. 190, Building 8) requires machine operators to run injection moulding machines (50-250 tonne) producing plastic caps and containers, including mould loading assistance, monitoring cycle parameters, and basic reject sorting on the shop floor.
vacancies.eligibility: 10th pass, ITI in Plastic Processing/Mechanical trade preferred; minimum 1 year experience operating injection moulding machines; willingness to work rotational shifts including night shift.

note.hi: पार्क परिसर में किसी भी कानून-व्यवस्था की आपात स्थिति, चोरी या तत्काल पुलिस सहायता के लिए।

note.mr: वैयक्तिक गाळे किंवा सामायिक जागेतील वीजपुरवठा बिघाड, वायरिंग समस्या आणि इलेक्ट्रिकल पॅनेल दुरुस्तीसाठी संपर्क करा.

note.mr: सर्व इमारतींसाठी पाणीपुरवठा गळती, गटार तुंबणे आणि सॅनिटरी फिटिंग दुरुस्ती.

note.hi: त्रैमासिक कीट एवं कृंतक नियंत्रण उपचार निर्धारित है; तत्काल संक्रमण की शिकायत हेतु कॉल करें।
note.mr: दर तिमाहीला ठरलेली कीड व उंदीर नियंत्रण प्रक्रिया केली जाते; तातडीच्या तक्रारीसाठी संपर्क करा.

polls.question: Which security service provider should the federation engage for FY 2026–27?
polls.description: The federation's current security contract with Shield Force Security Solutions expires on 31 August 2026. The managing committee has shortlisted three vendors after inviting quotations. Please vote for your preferred agency; the decision will be finalized based on majority member input at the next general body meeting.

polls.question: Do you support the proposed revision in monthly maintenance charges from Rs 3.50 to Rs 4.25 per sq. ft.?
polls.description: Rising costs of common-area electricity, water tankers, security wages, and housekeeping have pushed the federation's operating expenses up by nearly 18% over the last two years. The managing committee proposes revising the per-square-foot maintenance rate effective from the next quarter. Kindly share your view before it is tabled at the AGM.
options: Yes, approve the revised rate of Rs 4.25/sq.ft.
No, retain the current rate of Rs 3.50/sq.ft.
Need more details/cost breakup before deciding

polls.question: Which day of the week is most convenient for deep-cleaning of common passages and open plots?
polls.description: The housekeeping contractor currently carries out deep-cleaning of internal roads, drainage channels, and common plot areas on an ad-hoc basis. The committee wants to fix a weekly schedule to minimize disruption to loading/unloading activity. Please indicate your preferred day.
options: No preference / any day is fine

polls.question: Would you be interested in a shared canteen facility within the industrial park?
polls.description: Several members have requested a common canteen/tiffin facility near Building F to serve workers across the park, reducing the need for individual units to arrange separate food deliveries. The federation is assessing demand before inviting a vendor to set up and operate the facility on a self-sustaining basis.
options: Interested, but only if subsidized rates are offered
Not interested, current arrangements are sufficient
Need more information about pricing and menu

documents.title: HDIL-IPCA Federation Bylaws (Amended 2024)
documents.description: The governing bylaws of the HDIL Industrial Park Cooperative Association, covering membership eligibility, managing committee composition, election procedure, maintenance fee structure, and dispute resolution mechanism. Last amended and adopted at the Special General Meeting held on 14 April 2024.

documents.title: Minutes of the 9th Annual General Meeting (AGM) — 28 June 2026
documents.description: Record of proceedings from the 9th AGM, including the annual financial statement review, election of two new managing committee members, ratification of the FY 2025–26 audit report, and resolutions passed on common-area CCTV upgrade and fire-safety compliance timelines.

documents.title: Circular: Mandatory Fire-Safety Audit and NOC Renewal — All Gala Owners
documents.description: Circular dated 3 May 2026 directing all gala owners and tenants to complete the annual fire-safety equipment inspection and renew their Fire NOC with the Vasai-Virar Municipal Corporation before 31 July 2026, in line with the Maharashtra Fire Prevention and Life Safety Measures Act.

documents.title: Maintenance Fee Structure and Payment Schedule FY 2026–27
documents.description: Detailed break-up of the monthly maintenance charge per square foot, applicable slab rates for corner and ground-floor galas, due dates, late-payment penalty clause, and accepted modes of payment (NEFT, cheque, and UPI) for the current financial year.

documents.title: Membership Application and Transfer Form
documents.description: Standard form to be submitted by new gala owners or tenants for federation membership registration, and by existing members for transfer of membership upon sale, lease, or succession of a gala unit, along with the list of supporting documents required (sale deed, GST certificate, no-dues certificate).

documents.title: Vendor Empanelment Policy for Security, Housekeeping & Facility Contractors
documents.description: Policy document outlining the eligibility criteria, tender/quotation process, contract tenure, and performance review mechanism for empanelling third-party vendors engaged by the federation for security, housekeeping, pest control, and common-area maintenance services.

title.en: Annual General Meeting 2026
title.hi: वार्षिक सर्वसाधारण सभा 2026
title.mr: वार्षिक सर्वसाधारण सभा २०२६

description.en: Members of HDIL-IPCA gathered at the federation hall to review the year's accounts, discuss maintenance charges, and elect the new managing committee.
description.hi: एचडीआईएल-आईपीसीए के सदस्य वर्ष के हिसाब-किताब की समीक्षा करने, रखरखाव शुल्क पर चर्चा करने और नई प्रबंध समिति चुनने के लिए फेडरेशन हॉल में एकत्र हुए।
description.mr: एचडीआयएल-आयपीसीएचे सदस्य वर्षभराच्या हिशोबाचा आढावा घेण्यासाठी, देखभाल शुल्कावर चर्चा करण्यासाठी आणि नवीन व्यवस्थापन समिती निवडण्यासाठी फेडरेशन सभागृहात जमले.

itemCaptions.en: Members registering and signing the attendance register at the entrance desk.
itemCaptions.hi: सदस्य प्रवेश द्वार पर उपस्थिति रजिस्टर में हस्ताक्षर करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: सदस्य प्रवेशद्वारावरील हजेरी नोंदवहीत स्वाक्षरी करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Chairman Ramesh Patil addressing members on the year's maintenance and security priorities.
itemCaptions.hi: अध्यक्ष रमेश पाटील सदस्यों को वर्ष की रखरखाव और सुरक्षा प्राथमिकताओं के बारे में संबोधित करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: अध्यक्ष रमेश पाटील सदस्यांना वर्षभरातील देखभाल आणि सुरक्षा प्राधान्यांबाबत मार्गदर्शन करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Treasurer presenting the annual income-expenditure statement on the projector screen.
itemCaptions.hi: कोषाध्यक्ष प्रोजेक्टर स्क्रीन पर वार्षिक आय-व्यय विवरण प्रस्तुत करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: खजिनदार प्रोजेक्टर स्क्रीनवर वार्षिक जमाखर्चाचा तपशील सादर करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Members raising hands to vote on the revised monthly maintenance charges.
itemCaptions.hi: सदस्य संशोधित मासिक रखरखाव शुल्क पर मतदान के लिए हाथ उठाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: सुधारित मासिक देखभाल शुल्कावर मतदानासाठी सदस्य हात वर करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Outgoing committee members being felicitated with mementoes.
itemCaptions.hi: निवर्तमान समिति सदस्यों को स्मृति चिन्ह देकर सम्मानित किया गया।
itemCaptions.mr: निवृत्त होणाऱ्या समिती सदस्यांचा स्मृतिचिन्ह देऊन सत्कार करण्यात आला.

itemCaptions.en: The newly elected managing committee posing together after the meeting.
itemCaptions.hi: बैठक के बाद नवनिर्वाचित प्रबंध समिति का समूह फोटो।
itemCaptions.mr: सभेनंतर नवनिर्वाचित व्यवस्थापन समितीचा सामूहिक फोटो.

title.en: Ganesh Chaturthi Celebrations
title.hi: गणेश चतुर्थी उत्सव
title.mr: गणेश चतुर्थी उत्सव

description.en: The park's Sarvajanik Ganeshotsav Mandal celebrated ten days of festivities with daily aarti, cultural programmes, and a spirited visarjan procession.
description.hi: पार्क के सार्वजनिक गणेशोत्सव मंडल ने दस दिनों तक रोज़ाना आरती, सांस्कृतिक कार्यक्रमों और उत्साहपूर्ण विसर्जन जुलूस के साथ उत्सव मनाया।
description.mr: पार्कच्या सार्वजनिक गणेशोत्सव मंडळाने दहा दिवस रोज आरती, सांस्कृतिक कार्यक्रम आणि जल्लोषपूर्ण विसर्जन मिरवणुकीसह उत्सव साजरा केला.

itemCaptions.en: The Ganpati idol being carefully installed on the decorated stage near the main gate.
itemCaptions.hi: मुख्य गेट के पास सजाए गए मंच पर गणपति की मूर्ति सावधानीपूर्वक स्थापित की जाती हुई।
itemCaptions.mr: मुख्य गेटजवळील सजवलेल्या मंचावर गणपतीची मूर्ती काळजीपूर्वक प्रतिष्ठापित करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Workers and their families performing the morning aarti together.
itemCaptions.hi: श्रमिक और उनके परिवार साथ मिलकर सुबह की आरती करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: कामगार आणि त्यांचे कुटुंबीय एकत्र सकाळची आरती करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Volunteers distributing modak and prasad to unit owners and workers.
itemCaptions.hi: स्वयंसेवक गाला मालिकों और श्रमिकों को मोदक व प्रसाद बांटते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: स्वयंसेवक गाळाधारक व कामगारांना मोदक आणि प्रसाद वाटताना.

itemCaptions.en: Children participating in the fancy-dress competition held during the festival.
itemCaptions.hi: उत्सव के दौरान आयोजित फैंसी ड्रेस प्रतियोगिता में भाग लेते बच्चे।
itemCaptions.mr: उत्सवादरम्यान आयोजित फॅन्सी ड्रेस स्पर्धेत सहभागी झालेली मुले.

itemCaptions.en: The visarjan procession moving out of the park with dhol-tasha in full swing.
itemCaptions.hi: ढोल-ताशों की गूंज के साथ विसर्जन जुलूस पार्क से बाहर निकलते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: ढोल-ताशांच्या गजरात विसर्जन मिरवणूक पार्कमधून बाहेर पडताना.

title.en: Fire Safety Mock Drill
title.hi: अग्नि सुरक्षा मॉक ड्रिल
title.mr: अग्निसुरक्षा मॉक ड्रिल

description.en: In coordination with the Virar Fire Brigade, HDIL-IPCA conducted a mock fire drill across the park to train gala owners and workers in evacuation and firefighting basics.
description.hi: विरार अग्निशमन दल के सहयोग से, एचडीआईएल-आईपीसीए ने गाला मालिकों और श्रमिकों को निकासी और अग्निशमन की बुनियादी बातों में प्रशिक्षित करने के लिए पार्क में मॉक फायर ड्रिल आयोजित की।
description.mr: विरार अग्निशमन दलाच्या सहकार्याने, एचडीआयएल-आयपीसीएने गाळाधारक व कामगारांना निर्वासन आणि अग्निशमनाच्या मूलभूत गोष्टींचे प्रशिक्षण देण्यासाठी पार्कमध्ये मॉक फायर ड्रिल आयोजित केली.

itemCaptions.en: Firemen from Virar Fire Station demonstrating the use of a portable fire extinguisher.
itemCaptions.hi: विरार अग्निशमन केंद्र के जवान पोर्टेबल अग्निशामक यंत्र के इस्तेमाल का प्रदर्शन करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: विरार अग्निशमन केंद्रातील जवान पोर्टेबल अग्निशामक यंत्राचा वापर दाखवताना.

itemCaptions.en: Gala workers practising the evacuation drill from a first-floor unit.
itemCaptions.hi: गाला श्रमिक पहली मंज़िल की यूनिट से निकासी अभ्यास करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: गाळ्यातील कामगार पहिल्या मजल्यावरील युनिटमधून निर्वासनाचा सराव करताना.

itemCaptions.en: A mock fire being doused near the chemical storage unit in Building 9.
itemCaptions.hi: बिल्डिंग नंबर 9 स्थित रासायनिक भंडारण यूनिट के पास मॉक आग बुझाई जाती हुई।
itemCaptions.mr: इमारत क्रमांक ९ मधील रासायनिक साठवण युनिटजवळ मॉक आग विझवताना.

itemCaptions.en: The fire brigade vehicle stationed at the main gate during the drill.
itemCaptions.hi: ड्रिल के दौरान मुख्य गेट पर खड़ा अग्निशमन वाहन।
itemCaptions.mr: ड्रिलदरम्यान मुख्य गेटवर उभे असलेले अग्निशमन वाहन.

itemCaptions.en: Federation members and fire officers discussing the fire audit report after the drill.
itemCaptions.hi: ड्रिल के बाद फेडरेशन सदस्य और अग्निशमन अधिकारी फायर ऑडिट रिपोर्ट पर चर्चा करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: ड्रिलनंतर फेडरेशनचे सदस्य आणि अग्निशमन अधिकारी फायर ऑडिट अहवालावर चर्चा करताना.

title.en: Internal Road Resurfacing Work
title.hi: आंतरिक सड़क पुनर्निर्माण कार्य
title.mr: अंतर्गत रस्ता डांबरीकरण काम

description.en: The federation carried out asphalt resurfacing of the pothole-ridden internal roads connecting the park's buildings ahead of the monsoon.
description.hi: फेडरेशन ने मानसून से पहले पार्क की इमारतों को जोड़ने वाली गड्ढों वाली आंतरिक सड़कों का डामरीकरण कराया।
description.mr: पावसाळ्यापूर्वी फेडरेशनने पार्कमधील इमारतींना जोडणाऱ्या खड्डेयुक्त अंतर्गत रस्त्यांचे डांबरीकरण करून घेतले.

itemCaptions.en: Workers laying fresh asphalt on the internal road connecting Building 3 and Building 4.
itemCaptions.hi: श्रमिक बिल्डिंग 3 और बिल्डिंग 4 को जोड़ने वाली आंतरिक सड़क पर नया डामर बिछाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: कामगार इमारत क्रमांक ३ आणि ४ ला जोडणाऱ्या अंतर्गत रस्त्यावर नवीन डांबर टाकताना.

itemCaptions.en: A road roller compacting the newly laid tar surface near the main gate.
itemCaptions.hi: मुख्य गेट के पास नए बिछे डामर को समतल करता रोड रोलर।
itemCaptions.mr: मुख्य गेटजवळ नव्याने टाकलेला डांबरी पृष्ठभाग सपाट करणारा रोड रोलर.

itemCaptions.en: The contractor's team marking out drainage-side edges before resurfacing begins.
itemCaptions.hi: डामरीकरण शुरू होने से पहले ठेकेदार की टीम नाली की ओर के किनारों को चिह्नित करती हुई।
itemCaptions.mr: डांबरीकरण सुरू होण्यापूर्वी कंत्राटदाराचे कर्मचारी गटाराच्या बाजूची कडा आखताना.

itemCaptions.en: Committee members inspecting the completed stretch outside Building 7.
itemCaptions.hi: समिति सदस्य बिल्डिंग 7 के बाहर पूरे हो चुके सड़क हिस्से का निरीक्षण करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: समिती सदस्य इमारत क्रमांक ७ बाहेरील पूर्ण झालेल्या रस्त्याच्या भागाची पाहणी करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Heavy vehicles parked aside to allow resurfacing work near the loading bay.
itemCaptions.hi: लोडिंग बे के पास डामरीकरण कार्य के लिए एक तरफ खड़े भारी वाहन।
itemCaptions.mr: लोडिंग बेजवळ डांबरीकरणाचे काम होण्यासाठी बाजूला उभी केलेली अवजड वाहने.

title.en: Tree Plantation Drive
title.hi: वृक्षारोपण अभियान
title.mr: वृक्षारोपण मोहीम

description.en: HDIL-IPCA members, along with local schoolchildren, planted over a hundred saplings along the park's boundary wall as part of a green-cover initiative.
description.hi: एचडीआईएल-आईपीसीए के सदस्यों ने स्थानीय स्कूली बच्चों के साथ मिलकर हरित आवरण पहल के तहत पार्क की सीमा दीवार के किनारे सौ से अधिक पौधे लगाए।
description.mr: एचडीआयएल-आयपीसीएच्या सदस्यांनी स्थानिक शालेय मुलांसह हरित आच्छादन उपक्रमांतर्गत पार्कच्या सीमाभिंतीलगत शंभराहून अधिक रोपे लावली.

itemCaptions.en: Committee members planting saplings along the compound wall near Gate No. 2.
itemCaptions.hi: समिति सदस्य गेट नंबर 2 के पास परिसर की दीवार के किनारे पौधे रोपते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: समिती सदस्य गेट क्रमांक २ जवळील आवाराच्या भिंतीलगत रोपे लावताना.

itemCaptions.en: Schoolchildren from a nearby municipal school helping water the newly planted saplings.
itemCaptions.hi: पास के नगरपालिका स्कूल के बच्चे नए लगाए गए पौधों को पानी देने में मदद करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: जवळच्या महानगरपालिका शाळेतील मुले नव्याने लावलेल्या रोपांना पाणी देण्यास मदत करताना.

itemCaptions.en: A gulmohar sapling being planted near the fire safety assembly point.
itemCaptions.hi: अग्नि सुरक्षा एकत्रीकरण बिंदु के पास गुलमोहर का पौधा लगाया जाता हुआ।
itemCaptions.mr: अग्निसुरक्षा जमावबिंदूजवळ गुलमोहराचे रोप लावताना.

itemCaptions.en: Volunteers setting up tree guards to protect the young plants from stray cattle.
itemCaptions.hi: स्वयंसेवक आवारा मवेशियों से नए पौधों की सुरक्षा के लिए ट्री गार्ड लगाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: मोकाट जनावरांपासून रोपांचे संरक्षण करण्यासाठी स्वयंसेवक ट्री गार्ड बसवताना.

itemCaptions.en: Group photo of participants with the forest department official after the drive.
itemCaptions.hi: अभियान के बाद वन विभाग के अधिकारी के साथ प्रतिभागियों का समूह फोटो।
itemCaptions.mr: मोहिमेनंतर वन विभागाच्या अधिकाऱ्यासोबत सहभागींचा सामूहिक फोटो.

title.en: Independence Day Flag Hoisting
title.hi: स्वतंत्रता दिवस ध्वजारोहण
title.mr: स्वातंत्र्य दिन ध्वजारोहण

description.en: HDIL-IPCA marked the 15th of August with flag hoisting, the national anthem, and sweets for the security staff and workers of the park.
description.hi: एचडीआईएल-आईपीसीए ने 15 अगस्त को ध्वजारोहण, राष्ट्रगान और पार्क के सुरक्षा कर्मियों व श्रमिकों को मिठाई बांटकर मनाया।
description.mr: एचडीआयएल-आयपीसीएने १५ ऑगस्ट रोजी ध्वजारोहण, राष्ट्रगीत आणि पार्कातील सुरक्षारक्षक व कामगारांना मिठाई वाटून हा दिवस साजरा केला.

itemCaptions.en: Chairman Ramesh Patil hoisting the national flag at the federation office premises.
itemCaptions.hi: अध्यक्ष रमेश पाटील फेडरेशन कार्यालय परिसर में राष्ट्रीय ध्वज फहराते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: अध्यक्ष रमेश पाटील फेडरेशन कार्यालयाच्या आवारात राष्ट्रध्वज फडकावताना.

itemCaptions.en: Members and workers singing the national anthem after the flag hoisting.
itemCaptions.hi: ध्वजारोहण के बाद सदस्य और श्रमिक राष्ट्रगान गाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: ध्वजारोहणानंतर सदस्य आणि कामगार राष्ट्रगीत गाताना.

itemCaptions.en: Children of staff members performing a patriotic dance for the occasion.
itemCaptions.hi: स्टाफ सदस्यों के बच्चे इस अवसर पर देशभक्ति नृत्य प्रस्तुत करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: कर्मचाऱ्यांची मुले या प्रसंगी देशभक्तिपर नृत्य सादर करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Sweets being distributed to security staff and workers after the ceremony.
itemCaptions.hi: समारोह के बाद सुरक्षा कर्मियों और श्रमिकों को मिठाई बांटी जाती हुई।
itemCaptions.mr: समारंभानंतर सुरक्षारक्षक व कामगारांना मिठाई वाटताना.

itemCaptions.en: The federation building decorated with tricolour buntings for the day.
itemCaptions.hi: इस दिन के लिए तिरंगे झंडियों से सजी फेडरेशन इमारत।
itemCaptions.mr: या दिवसासाठी तिरंगी पताकांनी सजवलेली फेडरेशन इमारत.

title.en: New Members' Welcome Meet
title.hi: नए सदस्यों का स्वागत समारोह
title.mr: नवीन सदस्यांचा स्वागत मेळावा

description.en: HDIL-IPCA hosted a welcome meet for gala owners who joined the park this year, introducing them to the federation's rules, services, and fellow members.
description.hi: एचडीआईएल-आईपीसीए ने इस वर्ष पार्क से जुड़े गाला मालिकों के लिए एक स्वागत समारोह आयोजित किया, जिसमें उन्हें फेडरेशन के नियमों, सेवाओं और साथी सदस्यों से परिचित कराया गया।
description.mr: एचडीआयएल-आयपीसीएने यंदा पार्कमध्ये सामील झालेल्या गाळाधारकांसाठी स्वागत मेळावा आयोजित केला, ज्यात त्यांना फेडरेशनचे नियम, सेवा आणि इतर सदस्यांची ओळख करून देण्यात आली.

itemCaptions.en: New unit owners being welcomed with flowers at the federation office.
itemCaptions.hi: फेडरेशन कार्यालय में नए यूनिट मालिकों का फूलों से स्वागत किया गया।
itemCaptions.mr: फेडरेशन कार्यालयात नवीन युनिट मालकांचे फुलांनी स्वागत करण्यात आले.

itemCaptions.en: The secretary explaining the park's bye-laws and maintenance rules to new members.
itemCaptions.hi: सचिव नए सदस्यों को पार्क के उपनियमों और रखरखाव नियमों के बारे में समझाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: सचिव नवीन सदस्यांना पार्कच्या उपविधी आणि देखभाल नियमांबाबत माहिती देताना.

itemCaptions.en: New members receiving their identity cards and gate passes.
itemCaptions.hi: नए सदस्यों को उनके पहचान पत्र और गेट पास दिए जाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: नवीन सदस्यांना त्यांचे ओळखपत्र आणि गेट पास दिले जाताना.

itemCaptions.en: An informal tea and snacks session for new and existing members to network.
itemCaptions.hi: नए और पुराने सदस्यों के बीच परिचय के लिए अनौपचारिक चाय-नाश्ता सत्र।
itemCaptions.mr: नवीन आणि जुन्या सदस्यांमध्ये ओळख होण्यासाठी अनौपचारिक चहा-नाश्ता सत्र.

itemCaptions.en: Group photo of the newly inducted gala owners with the managing committee.
itemCaptions.hi: नए शामिल हुए गाला मालिकों का प्रबंध समिति के साथ समूह फोटो।
itemCaptions.mr: नव्याने सामील झालेल्या गाळाधारकांचा व्यवस्थापन समितीसोबतचा सामूहिक फोटो.

title.en: Pre-Monsoon Drainage Works
title.hi: मानसून-पूर्व नाला सफाई कार्य
title.mr: पावसाळ्यापूर्वीची गटार सफाई कामे

description.en: Ahead of the monsoon, the federation desilted storm-water drains and cleared culverts around the park to prevent waterlogging near the buildings.
description.hi: मानसून से पहले, फेडरेशन ने इमारतों के पास जलभराव रोकने के लिए तूफानी जल नालियों की सफाई और पार्क के आसपास के पुलियों की सफाई कराई।
description.mr: पावसाळ्यापूर्वी, इमारतींजवळ पाणी साचू नये यासाठी फेडरेशनने वादळी पाण्याच्या गटारांचा गाळ काढला आणि पार्क परिसरातील पुलियांची सफाई केली.

itemCaptions.en: Workers desilting the main storm-water drain along the boundary road.
itemCaptions.hi: श्रमिक सीमा सड़क के किनारे मुख्य तूफानी जल नाले से गाद निकालते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: कामगार सीमारस्त्यालगतच्या मुख्य वादळी पाण्याच्या गटारातील गाळ काढताना.

itemCaptions.en: A JCB machine clearing accumulated debris from the culvert near Gate No. 1.
itemCaptions.hi: गेट नंबर 1 के पास पुलिया से जमा मलबा साफ करती जेसीबी मशीन।
itemCaptions.mr: गेट क्रमांक १ जवळील पुलियातील साचलेला राडारोडा काढणारी जेसीबी मशीन.

itemCaptions.en: Committee members inspecting a waterlogging-prone stretch near Building 11.
itemCaptions.hi: समिति सदस्य बिल्डिंग 11 के पास जलभराव-संभावित हिस्से का निरीक्षण करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: समिती सदस्य इमारत क्रमांक ११ जवळील पाणी साचण्याची शक्यता असलेल्या भागाची पाहणी करताना.

itemCaptions.en: Labourers clearing plastic waste blocking the drain outlet.
itemCaptions.hi: मजदूर नाले के आउटलेट को अवरुद्ध कर रहे प्लास्टिक कचरे को साफ करते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: मजूर गटाराच्या निर्गम मार्गात अडथळा आणणारा प्लास्टिक कचरा काढताना.

itemCaptions.en: The cleaned drain after completion of the pre-monsoon works.
itemCaptions.hi: मानसून-पूर्व कार्य पूरा होने के बाद साफ किया गया नाला।
itemCaptions.mr: पावसाळ्यापूर्वीचे काम पूर्ण झाल्यानंतर स्वच्छ करण्यात आलेले गटार.

title.en: Diwali Get-Together
title.hi: दिवाली मिलन समारोह
title.mr: दिवाळी स्नेहमेळावा

description.en: Members and their families gathered for an evening of diyas, rangoli, cultural performances, and a community dinner to celebrate Diwali together.

description.mr: सदस्य आणि त्यांचे कुटुंबीय दिवे, रांगोळी, सांस्कृतिक कार्यक्रम आणि सामुदायिक स्नेहभोजनासह दिवाळी साजरी करण्यासाठी एका संध्याकाळी एकत्र जमले.

itemCaptions.en: Members lighting diyas around the federation office courtyard.
itemCaptions.hi: सदस्य फेडरेशन कार्यालय के प्रांगण में दीये जलाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: सदस्य फेडरेशन कार्यालयाच्या प्रांगणात दिवे लावताना.

itemCaptions.en: Rangoli competition entries displayed by participating units.
itemCaptions.hi: रंगोली प्रतियोगिता में भाग लेने वाली यूनिटों द्वारा बनाई गई रंगोलियों की प्रदर्शनी।
itemCaptions.mr: रांगोळी स्पर्धेत सहभागी युनिट्सनी काढलेल्या रांगोळ्यांचे प्रदर्शन.

itemCaptions.en: A cultural evening with music and dance performances for members and families.
itemCaptions.hi: सदस्यों और परिवारों के लिए संगीत और नृत्य प्रस्तुतियों के साथ सांस्कृतिक संध्या।
itemCaptions.mr: सदस्य आणि कुटुंबीयांसाठी संगीत व नृत्य सादरीकरणासह सांस्कृतिक संध्याकाळ.

itemCaptions.en: Sweets and dry-fruit boxes being exchanged among unit owners.
itemCaptions.hi: यूनिट मालिकों के बीच मिठाई और सूखे मेवों के डिब्बे बांटे जाते हुए।
itemCaptions.mr: युनिट मालकांमध्ये मिठाई आणि सुक्या मेव्याचे डबे देवाणघेवाण होताना.

itemCaptions.en: Community dinner being served to members on the festive evening.

itemCaptions.mr: सणाच्या संध्याकाळी सदस्यांना सामुदायिक भोजन वाढले जाताना.

description.en: Bulk printing of letterheads, envelopes and visiting cards for local businesses.
